basic_details.job_title: BOBCAPS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Editor, Assistant Manager and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Editor, Assistant Manager and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest BOB Capital Markets Limited (BOBCAPS) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Editor, Assistant Manager, and More posts! Published on at bobcaps.in, this new recruitment drive offers multiple openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age limit as per BOBCAPS rules and possessing Any Graduate, Any Post Graduate, CA, MBA/PGDM qualifications can apply online from closes on 15th May 2026. Find all details about the BOBCAPS Editor, Assistant Manager, and More new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, online form, and notification PDF here.

age_limit.details: The draft information provided does not specify a detailed age limit range for these posts. Candidates are advised to refer to the official BOBCAPS notification for exact age criteria and any relaxation applicable for different positions.

qualification.education_qualification: Any Graduate, Any Post Graduate, CA, MBA/PGDM
qualification.details: Institutional Equity Research Associate: | Educational Qualification: Graduate, with preference for MBA /CFA / CA or equivalent from recognized Universities in India/overseas. | Job Description / Responsibilities: | Assist Analyst in generating Equity Research reports such as Initiating Coverage, sector thematic, Quarterly result updates of companies event updates etc. Assist in financial modeling for companies, developing and maintaining industry database and valuation sheets Interact with sales team as required for communicating research ideas and handling queries. Handle/ assist in servicing investors | Editor - Institutional Equity Research | Educational Qualification: Graduate and certification course in designing will be preferred | Job Description / Responsibilities: | Editing research reports written by analysts for correct use of language, consistency of style, clarity of thought and a logical report structure Giving relevant captions to reports and conveying report synopsis Interacting with analysts to understand the topic being covered and to enhance report presentation Providing inputs to analysts to improve their written communication skills Coordinating with the DTP team to ensure that reports are presented in the appropriate format Ensuring delivery of error-free reports within scheduled timelines Handling DTP tasks such as basic formatting, report upload and publications Maintain and monitor research report-based MIS | Assistant Manager - Retail Equity Dealing (Call & Trade Dealer) | Educational Qualification: Graduate, with preference for relevant post graduate qualificaƟons | Job specific skills : | Graduate / Postgraduate with minimum 2 yrs exp in EquiƟes on the client advisory side Should have sound understanding of capital markets. Should be a result-oriented, self-starter, proacƟve, good communicaƟon skills. | Retail Broking - Manager (Cluster Head - Pune) | Educational Qualification: Graduate/Post Graduate from recognized Universities | Job Description / Responsibilities: | The ability to establish and maintain effective working relationships with internal and external stakeholders. Extensive knowledge of the client acquisition process. Exposure to digital onboarding process would be preferred. Working knowledge of public and private sector bank retail branches. Previous experience of managing a large acquisition team in the specified State/Region. Understanding of the securities market. Previous experience in Retail Broking products and services is required. Strong analytical and strategic thinking abilities, as well as excellent communication and problem-solving abilities. Excellent writing, communication, presentation, and interpersonal abilities. | Head - Leads and Call Centre Management ( Manager / Senior Manager) | Educational Qualification: Graduate/ Post Graduate from recognized Universities, Advanced degree preferred. | Job specific skills: | Strong P&L understanding in Retail Broking. Be well attuned towards digitization; should come with a technology mind-set and think innovatively how to use tech to deliver KPIs effectively. Strong understanding of Online and digital broking industry. Excellent understanding of Indian Stock Market and trading strategies Ability to build and lead teams with demonstrated track record of leadership skills. Strong growth mind-set to lead and motivate the team in order to achieve higher market share. | Digital Business Development Managers (Off Roll) | Educational Qualification: Min 12th Pass from English Medium or Graduate (Any stream). Minimum 1 Year of experience in telesales (Financial product sales preferred.) | Lead Equity Research Analyst (NBFC/Insurance/Asset Management) | Educational Qualification: Post Graduate, with preference for MBA /CFA / CA or equivalent from recognized Universities in India/overseas. | Job specific skills: | Excellent oral & written communication skills Strong client relationships, endorsed by votes from large domestic and foreign institutional investor Strong relationship with company managements within the sector of expertise/focus Well versed with use of databases such as Bloomberg, CMIE, Reuters, Factset, etc. Ability to work independently and also as part of a team | Assistant Manager - Back Office Operation | Educational Qualification: Graduate from recognized Universities in India. | Job Description / Responsibilities: | Previous experience in Broking industry is required. Excellent verbal and written communication skills Microsoft Office prowess Basic knowledge of document management laws and regulations. Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail Ability to work independently and a desire to learn The ability to multitask and manage multiple priorities. Self-motivated and a strong team player. | Manager - Back Office Operations | Educational Qualification: Graduate from recognized Universities in India. | Institutional Equity Cash Sales Trader with execution knowledge / skill. (Senior Manager/Manager) | Educational Qualification: Graduate, with preference for MBA /CFA / CA or equivalent from recognized Universities in India/overseas.10+ Experience

vacancy_details.Position: Assistant Manager - Retail Equity Dealing (Call & Trade Dealer)
Head - Leads and Call Centre Management ( Manager / Senior Manager)
Institutional Equity Cash Sales Trader with execution knowledge / skill. (Senior Manager/Manager)

salary_details.pay_scale: As per BOBCAPS rules / industry standards
salary_details.details: The salary for BOBCAPS Editor, Assistant Manager and other posts will be as per company norms and industry standards. Exact pay structure, CTC range and variable components may differ by role, seniority and candidate profile and will be informed to shortlisted candidates.

selection_process: Stage 1: Shortlisting Applications will be screened based on qualification, experience, skills and suitability for the role.
Stage 2: Interview Shortlisted candidates will be called for one or more rounds of interview as decided by BOBCAPS.
Final Selection Final selection will be based on overall performance and company requirements.
The selection process is expected to be based on shortlisting of applications followed by interview(s). Only shortlisted candidates
will be called for the further selection process.
how_to_apply: Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official BOBCAPS website within the stipulated time. Candidates should keep an updated resume and relevant documents ready before starting the application process.
Visit the official website of BOBCAPS: https://www.bobcaps.in
Go to the Careers section on the homepage.
Open the relevant advertisement for Editor, Assistant Manager and other posts.
Read the detailed notification carefully and check eligibility conditions.
Upload your latest resume and other required documents, if asked.
Submit the application form on or before 15-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the submitted application / acknowledgement for future reference.
important_instructions: Candidates must ensure that they satisfy the eligibility criteria for the applied post before submitting the application. All details furnished in the application form should be correct and verifiable with original documents. BOBCAPS reserves the right to modify, cancel or restrict the recruitment process at any stage. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for the interview process; no separate communication will be sent to candidates who are not shortlisted. Any form of canvassing or influence will lead to disqualification.

faq.question: Q1. What is BOBCAPS Editor, Assistant Manager and More Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: BOBCAPS Editor, Assistant Manager and More Recruitment 2026 is a hiring drive by BOB Capital Markets Limited (a subsidiary of Bank of Baroda) to recruit Editors, Assistant Managers, Research Associates, Back Office staff and other specialists for its Institutional Equity, Retail Broking, Digital Business and Operations verticals, with applications accepted online up to 15 May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. Which posts are available under BOBCAPS Jobs 2026 notification?
faq.answer: The BOBCAPS Jobs 2026 notification covers multiple roles including Institutional Equity Research Associate, Editor – Institutional Equity Research, Assistant Manager – Retail Equity Dealing (Call & Trade Dealer), Retail Broking Manager (Cluster Head – Pune), Head – Leads and Call Centre Management, Digital Business Development Managers (Off Roll), Lead Equity Research Analyst (NBFC/Insurance/AMC), Assistant Manager – Back Office Operation, Manager – Back Office Operations, and Institutional Equity Cash Sales Trader.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply online for BOBCAPS Editor and Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for BOBCAPS Editor, Assistant Manager and other posts is 15‑05‑2026, and candidates are advised to apply well before the closing date to avoid last‑minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for BOBCAPS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Depending on the post, candidates must possess qualifications such as Any Graduate, Any Post Graduate, MBA/PGDM, CA, CFA or equivalent degrees from recognized universities in India or overseas, with specific roles like Equity Research Associate, Lead Equity Research Analyst and Institutional Equity Cash Sales Trader preferring MBA/CFA/CA candidates, while certain telesales or digital roles may allow 12th pass plus experience.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any age limit for BOBCAPS Editor, Assistant Manager and More posts?
faq.answer: The draft information for BOBCAPS Editor, Assistant Manager and other posts does not specify a fixed age limit range; age criteria and any relaxation (if applicable) are governed by BOBCAPS’ internal HR policies, so candidates should refer to the official notification PDF for detailed post‑wise age requirements.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary or pay scale for BOBCAPS Editor, Assistant Manager and other posts in 2026?
faq.answer: BOBCAPS offers salary as per company rules and prevailing industry standards, with compensation and CTC being negotiable based on role, experience and candidate profile, and for some senior positions the notification clearly mentions that compensation will not be a limiting factor for the right candidate.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for BOBCAPS Editor, Assistant Manager and More Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of applications based on qualifications, relevant experience and skills, followed by one or more rounds of interview, and only shortlisted candidates as per BOBCAPS’ internal criteria are called for the interview stage.
